subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1917-02-03
subcodes.first_line: Come and take this, Mirza Ahmad. Let me see what you can do. Let me see what the friends of God in these states will do.
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
